license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zjuf4nw
title: Enzo’s CGH Labeling Kit for Oligo Arrays
author: Hendrik F HFvE Van Essen

steps_raw.instruction: pipette the following in a nuclease free thermocycler strip: a.DNA X µl b. water19 – X µl(Vial W) b.Primers/Reaction buffer20 µl(Vial 1) Total volume:39 µl
Add cap, flick to mix contents and briefly spin down
Place in a cooled 96 well rack on ice 4 °C for 00:05:00
Add, while samples are on ice 4. °C : a.To test sample 10 µl Cy3(Vial 2) b.To reference sample10 µl Cy5(Vial 3) c.Klenow Exo-DNA Pol 1 µl (Vial 4) Total50 µl
Add cap, flick to mix contents and briefly spin down
Add 5µl of Stop Buffer (Vial 5), mix, and briefly centrifuge
Transfer labelled DNA’s to 1.5 ml reaction tubes and keep Cy3 and Cy5 labelled DNA’s separated
Add 275 µl of Binding Buffer (PB) PB binding buffer Qiagen Catalog #19066
Load column and centrifuge for 60 seconds at 16,000g and discard flow through
Add 650 µl of Wash Buffer (PE), centrifuge 60 seconds at 16,000g and discard flow through
Centrifuge for 60 seconds at 16,000g, discard centrifuge tube and place column in fresh 1.5 ml centrifuge tube
Add 10.5 µl of Elution Buffer (EB) (middle of the filter) and incubate for 1 minute.
Measure yield and specific dye incorporation with NanoDrop, Program MicroArray. Labelled, cleaned up gDNA can be stored at -20°C in the dark for 7 days.
Add 10.5 µl of Elution Buffer (EB) (middle of the filter) and incubate for 1 minute. .
